agent_summary: Customer reports: "Someone called me and asked for my OTP and PIN. They said they were from your team." Classified as phishing_or_social_engineering. Evidence cross-checked against no matching transaction in the recent history.
recommended_next_action: Open a fraud-risk ticket, flag the customer account with a phishing advisory, and provide only the official in-app support channel as the contact path.
customer_reply: Thank you for flagging this. Please do not share any PIN, OTP, password, or card details with anyone who contacts you. Our team will review the activity on your account and follow up through our official in-app support channel or hotline. If you have already shared credentials, please change your password immediately through the app.
